## Revision and environment

Commit, OS, Rust/Node/Anchor/Arcium versions:

## Reproduction

Minimal input and exact commands:

## Expected / actual result

Include logs with keys, wallet material, RPC credentials, and addresses redacted.

## Security impact

If exploitation could affect confidentiality, authorization, or funds, stop and use private vulnerability reporting.
